name: Suspicious File Download Using Office Application
notes:
This rule detects the usage of one of three Microsoft office applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) to download arbitrary files

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Suspicious File Download Using Office Application
SIGMA Description: Detects the usage of one of three Microsoft office applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) to download arbitrary files


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(powerpnt|winword|excel)\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of http
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious File Download Using Office Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(powerpnt|winword|excel)\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of http
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious File Download Using Office Application
Event description: Detects the usage of one of three Microsoft office applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) to download arbitrary files
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
